ddls:
CREATE TABLE "villages" (
  "village_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each village */,
  "gp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the GP (Gram Panchayat) the village belongs to */,
  "reserved" INTEGER /* Reserved status of the village (0 or 1) */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of females in the village */,
  "irrigation_infrastructure" INTEGER /* Irrigation infrastructure in the village (0 or 1) */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the village */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of males in the village */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the village in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the village's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the village's location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the village in meters */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the village was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the village */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("village_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_villages_gp_id FOREIGN KEY ("gp_id") REFERENCES gps ("gp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gps" (
  "gp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GP */,
  "gp_name" TEXT /* Name of the GP */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the GP is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the GP's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the GP's location */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the GP was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the GP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation infrastructure */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village the infrastructure belongs to */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water for the infrastructure */,
  "water_availability" INTEGER /* Availability of water in the infrastructure */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation infrastructure (e.g., canal, well, pump) */,
  "construction_date" TEXT /* Date when the infrastructure was constructed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the infrastructure (e.g., operational, under repair) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the infrastructure in cubic meters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_infrastructure_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water availability record */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village the record belongs to */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water */,
  "water_availability" INTEGER /* Availability of water */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the water availability was measured */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., liters, cubic meters) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the water source (e.g., available, depleted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the water availability record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_availability_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water usage record */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village the record belongs to */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water */,
  "water_usage" INTEGER /* Usage of water */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the water usage was measured */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., liters, cubic meters) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of water usage (e.g., irrigation, household) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the water usage record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_usage_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, field worker) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., water usage, irrigation infrastructure) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village the data visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the data visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the data visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data visualization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization file (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "village_id" INTEGER /* ID of the village the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, new report) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_village_id FOREIGN KEY ("village_id") REFERENCES villages ("village_id")
)
